summary: PIN lock screen; entering the correct PIN 11111 unlocks it. Taps key 1 five times, then ASSERTS the unlock outcome (mobile-input-status reads "unlocked").
Tinder-style swipeable card deck driven by three bottom buttons; tap like (heart) then dislike (close) to fly cards off, then reset.
Full-screen Skia logarithmic spiral; a full-screen invisible pressable re-randomizes the spiral angle on each tap, springing all circles to new positions.
Vertical sectioned content list with a scroll-driven progress indicator; scroll DOWN through sections then back UP to drive the progress animation.
Grid/list layout toggle; a floating FAB at bottom-right morphs the layout between grid and list with shared LinearTransition image animations.
Floating bottom tab bar (Home/Bookmark/Add/Profile/Settings, icon tabs — no text labels); tap the rightmost then second tab to slide the floating indicator.
Two cards with a clip-path reveal on press; pressing 'Explore Demos' then 'Learn More' triggers the expanding-circle clip animation revealing the description.

Skia theme switcher: six selectable color squares around the screen center; tapping a square flood-fills the background via an expanding clip circle. Squares are pure Skia touchables (no per-square RN view), so the interaction drags across the canvas rect to sweep over multiple squares.
Product list where tapping a row's buy button morphs it into a confirm bottom-sheet; tap an item to open, confirm 'Add to cart', then dismiss.

Skia-rendered bottom tab bar (Home/Search/User as icons). Tabs are pure Skia touchables inside a single Touchable.Canvas (no per-tab RN view), so tapping the tab-bar rect center activates the centered Search tab.
Cuberto-style balloon slider: a 300px horizontal track centered on screen; dragging the picker along the track pops up the balloon value indicator.

Skia metaball: two blurred circles stacked at screen center; dragging one circle away stretches the gooey metaball connection, springing back on release. Circles are Skia touchables, so the drag is performed across the canvas rect.
Two-column image grid; tapping a card navigates to a details screen with a shared-element transition, then back returns with the reverse transition.
Horizontal paged story carousel (cards 70% screen width) with snapToInterval; swiping LEFT pages through stories with a coverflow-style transform.
Top country tabs (France/Italy/Iceland/Norway/Japan) over a paged ScrollView; tapping a tab scrolls the pager and slides the dynamic underline indicator.
Passive Skia animation: two noise-driven gradient circles drift and blur on an infinite looping clock with no user input.
Vertically-centered dropdown with a 'Header' row that expands 4 icon options on tap. Open the dropdown via the header trigger, then pick the Calendar option.
Skia image with a draggable bottom sheet handle near the bottom. Pan up on the canvas to open the sheet (snaps open), then pan back down to close.
Floating action button (bottom-right) that morphs into a centered modal on tap; tapping the trigger opens it, ending on the open modal state.
Audio waveform scrubber with a pan-draggable playhead and a live time readout. Drag across the waveform to scrub forward, then back.
Full-width paged color carousel backed by a radial-gradient Skia canvas; the active index drives the background color. Swipe horizontally to page through items.
300px centered 3D card that tilts toward the touch point with a delayed-parallax logo. Drag across the card to drive the rotation, then release to recenter.
Full-width fluid slider with a metaball value bubble. Drag along the horizontal track to change the value.
Sectioned movie list with a sliding tab indicator over a scrollable FlatList. Scroll the list to move the indicator, then tap a section tab to jump.
Skia radar chart with a 'Shuffle' button that re-randomizes the data and animates the polygons. Tap Shuffle twice to trigger the animation.
Skia image cropper with draggable grid corners and Expand/Collapse/Crop buttons. Collapse the crop region, drag a corner, then tap Crop to open the cropped detail.
4-column grid of 50 cells; tapping cells toggles selection and reveals a floating counter button. Tap several cells to select them.
Large animated rolling number with a shuffle FAB at the bottom-right. Tap the FAB twice to roll the count to new random values.
QR generator (qrcode demo): a TextInput drives a live Skia QR code, plus a 'Deviation' slider. Type new text to regenerate the QR, then drag the slider to change the deviation.
Draggable white pill over a photo; tapping it opens a blurred context popup with four direction options. Tap the pill to open the popup, then pick 'Bottom Right' to spring the pill to that corner.
Twitter-style bottom tab bar (Home, Search, Notifications, Message) with an animated active indicator and a contextual floating button. Tap different tabs to move the indicator.
Horizontal paged image wheel (snaps per item) with a 'Scale' Switch near the top. Swipe the carousel to page through, then toggle the Scale switch to enable the scaling effect.
A single centered 'Start' chip that splits into two icon buttons (Google left / Apple right) on tap, then commits on a second tap. Tests the split-open then select interaction.

Telegram-style app shell where an 80x80 Lottie switch button (bottom-right, above the tab bar) triggers a full-screen circular reveal that swaps light/dark theme. Tests tapping the switch to toggle the theme twice.

Full-screen Skia drawing canvas: the user draws a freehand path with a pan gesture, then on release the Fourier series animates epicycles redrawing that path. Tests drawing a stroke across the canvas.
Horizontal paging onboarding carousel of cat photos with an interpolated gradient background and per-page titles. Tests swiping LEFT through pages to advance the carousel.
A status-morphing button ('Check Transaction') that animates idle -> loading -> success/error with color and label transitions. Tests tapping to run the 2s mutation and observe the state change.

A gradient FAB opens a multi-page scrollable bottom sheet; the sheet pages advance via a 'Next Page' button and the sheet can be dragged. Tests opening the sheet then advancing a page, ending on the open sheet.
A full-width circular Skia color wheel with a draggable picker knob; dragging across the wheel updates the selected color. Tests dragging across the picker area.
A vertical FlatList of cards where items blur and scale based on their distance from the screen center as you scroll. Tests scrolling down then back up to drive the focus-blur effect.
An Airbnb-style price slider with an animated rolling-digit count and currency symbol above a horizontal track. Tests dragging the slider knob along its track to drive the price counter.
A segmented control (Light / Standard / Pro) that switches between datasets and animates a Skia line graph re-drawing between them. Tests tapping the segments to morph the graph.
A rotating + FAB opens a bottom action tray; the Continue button advances through its steps. Tap the FAB, then the Continue button twice, ending on the open tray.
A 'Toast!' button that stacks animated toast notifications; toasts can be swiped left to dismiss. Tests spawning toasts and swiping the active one away to the left.

A centered dark Skia panel hiding a numeric code; dragging a finger across it reveals the digits under a moving spotlight lens that scales nearby characters. Tests dragging across the panel to reveal the code.
A bottom-tab navigator (Home / Explore / Camera / Settings) with a blurred glass tab bar and an animated active indicator over full-screen images. Tests tapping tabs to move the indicator.

A draggable colored circle behind a Skia fractal-glass mask that refracts the circle into vertical glass strips; a FAB toggles light/dark theme. Tests dragging the circle across the glass and toggling the theme.
A vertical sortable list where a long-press-drag reorders items with animated reflow and border-radius feedback on the active row. Tests dragging the top item down past others to reorder.

Animated Skia Fibonacci shader disc driven by a horizontal AnimatedSlider (controls circle count N) plus a floating magic button that randomizes the pattern. Tests dragging the slider and pressing the magic button.
Family-style large animated number display fed by a custom on-screen numeric keypad (3x4 grid in the lower half). Tests tapping the on-screen digit buttons and the backspace key.

Two-sided balance slider (Coffee vs Milk) centered on screen; dragging the central handle redistributes the left/right percentages. Tests horizontal drag across the slider track at its real vertical center.
Animated Skia Fibonacci shader disc controlled by a 2D draggable control panel (X = circle count, Y = magical multiplier). Tests dragging across the square control pad to alter the shader.

Verification code entry: tapping the code boxes focuses an invisible number-pad TextInput; typing fills the animated digit cells (correct code 11111 triggers the success animation). Tests focusing the field and entering the code.

Email-style stacked list with two floating action buttons at the bottom (green restore, red delete) that animate cards in/out and shake at the limits. Tests pressing delete several times then restore.
Inverted vertical FlatList of large blurred numbers with a 3D depth/blur transition keyed to scroll position and snap-to-interval. Tests vertical paged swipes that snap between number items.

Centered credit-card row showing a 16-digit number with an eye toggle button on the card's right edge; toggling staggers the first 12 digits between hidden and revealed. Tests tapping the eye button to reveal then hide.

A single centered 'Show stacked tray' button that presents a bottom sheet; pressing again pushes additional sheets onto the stack, which can then be swiped down to dismiss. Tests presenting stacked sheets then dismissing.
Notes app whose 'Add Note' (+) header button navigates to an AddNote screen via a GLSL DirectionalWarp transition. Tests tapping the + button to trigger the GL transition into the add-note screen.

Skia image editor whose ButterflyWaveScrawler GL transition progress is driven by a horizontal ruler/scrubber slider near the bottom of the screen. Tests dragging the bottom scrubber left and right to scrub the transition.

A centered QR code that assembles/disassembles its modules with a staggered animation each time it is pressed (PressableScale toggle). Tests tapping the QR code to toggle the assemble/disassemble animation.
Infinite circular horizontal carousel of theme cards with snap + a background gradient that animates to the active card's color. Tests horizontal paged swipes that advance the active card.
A 'Slide to Unlock' friction slider whose horizontal drag drives animated squares and a haptic unlock at full progress. Tests dragging the slider thumb across the track from left to right.

Animated count display driven by a vertical draggable ruler/wheel in the center; a bottom-right button toggles expanded (wider) line spacing. Tests vertical swipes on the wheel to change the value, then tapping expand.
A long vertical scroll list (50 cards) where items scale and fade into a stacked deck at the bottom as you scroll. Tests scrolling the list down so items stack at the bottom.
Skia geometry button (concentric circles) centered on black screen; tapping morphs the stroke width with a spring + haptic.
Inverted FlatList; swiping up morphs a record button via scroll-driven progress interpolation and triggers the snap.
Skia dot-grid that renders a number; tapping the grid clears it then renders a new random number (700ms delayed).
Horizontal paged inverted ScrollView driving a stack of iMessage-style cards animated off scroll offset.
Skia Atlas button ('React Native' label) centered; tapping animates the square atlas + scales the button with a spring.
Skia Atlas sphere of squares scaled by distance from the touch point; a Pan gesture moves the focal point.
Grid of wrapped checkboxes (all labeled 'Italian'); each tap toggles a spring-animated checkmark + label color.
Movie-detail screen with a floating theme toggle (bottom-right); tapping runs a rescaler/blur light-dark appearance transition.
Onboarding screen with a 'Start your Journey' button that focuses a hidden card input, raising the Dot-style sheet/keyboard.
Horizontal paged FlatList of images with cover-flow rotation/scale driven by scroll offset.
Centered Skia paper that folds/unfolds via a spring; a full-screen pressable toggles the fold progress between 0 and 1.
Weekly Skia bar chart synced to a horizontal paged week list; paging changes the active week and animates the bars (with haptics).
3-step onboarding with animated dots and Back/Continue buttons; Continue advances the active step (label becomes 'Finish' on the last).
Circular draggable ruler slider that sets a count (with haptics), plus a start/stop button bottom-right.
Skia canvas pill of 4 tabs (Home/Changelog/Career/About) with an exclusion-blend selection indicator that slides between tabs; tabs are canvas-drawn so the whole pill carries one testID.
Scroll list of dark cards; tapping any card spawns a Clerk-style stacked toast that animates in and stacks.
Circular (donut) Skia slider; the picker handle is dragged around the ring to change the 1..12 value. Driven by swiping across the slider knob region.
A centered 'Continue' button that expands into an alert drawer with a Cancel button. Tap the trigger to open, then Cancel to dismiss.
A stacked list with a black '+' Add button; tapping it inserts a new item with a motion-blur entrance. Tap Add several times.
A centered Skia 'Delete' button with a gooey morph; first tap morphs to 'Confirm', second tap confirms. Tap the button twice.
A bottom tab navigator with a dynamic blur tab bar over a scrollable gradient screen. Tap different bottom-bar tabs to trigger the blur transition.
A playable Skia Snake board steered with directional fling gestures. Swipe in several directions on the board to change the snake's heading.
A mini player docked above a bottom tab bar; tapping it expands it into a full sheet, swiping down collapses it. Tap to expand then swipe down to collapse.
A Skia demo that animates a stroke tracing a bezier-curve outline; an 'Outline Mode' button toggles the outline overlay. Tap the toggle to switch modes.
A centered row of 4 tabs (Accounts/Home/Payments/Transfers) where the active tab expands its label. Tap different tabs to move the active indicator.
Neural-network MNIST demo: bottom half is a 28x28 Skia drawing canvas with an eraser button. Draw a digit with a couple of strokes to drive live prediction.
A '+' FAB that pushes a stack of modals, each with Confirm/Dismiss buttons; Confirm advances to the next stacked modal. Open the stack then confirm twice.
A passive demo driven entirely by device ROTATION/GRAVITY sensors (no touch handlers); a React logo reacts to tilt. On a simulator there is no input to exercise.
An OTP screen with an animated face that reacts to typing; tapping the code area focuses a hidden TextInput and entering 1111 drives the face animation. Focus and type the code.
A full-screen pressable that plays a staggered 'Everybody / can cook.' text reveal; tapping anywhere resets and replays. Tap the screen to retrigger the stagger.
A centered holographic ticket; tapping it flips it front/back (the holo tilt is device-motion driven). Tap the ticket to flip it.
A centered horizontal segmented control (Accounts/Deposits/Funds) with a fluid liquid-blur selector. Tap different segments to trigger the fluid blur transition.
Grid of gradient app tiles; long-press a tile to enter shake/edit mode (delete badges appear), then tap the badge to remove it.
A centered pill toggles its label between 'Use Max' and 'Using Max'; each tap re-composes the per-character spring layout animation.
Skia shader credit-card carousel with animated holographic reflections; the demo animates on its own with no required interaction.
Analog Skia clock driven by a vertical time-slot wheel; swipe the wheel up to scroll later times and watch the clock hands interpolate.
Tap Start Game to reveal the board and number pad, select the top-left cell, then tap the '5' key to fill it.
A centered circular plus button bursts a ring of particles and morphs the icon to a checkmark on press.
A draggable metallic puck spring-snaps to the nearest magnet point; swipe the puck to fling it and watch it snap to a new magnet.
iOS-style app grid; tap the first icon to play the expand-into-detail shared-element navigation transition.
Full-screen 'time machine' surface; swipe down to open the curved history stack revealing the scrollable cards behind it.
iOS-style app grid that plays a bouncy zoom-in intro; tap the screen to (re)trigger the bouncy spring animation that settles the icons into place.
A row of avatar chips split into online/offline sections; tap the surface to migrate an item between sections with a spring layout animation.
A floating control panel that can be dragged around the screen and spring-snaps to the nearest corner; swipe the panel to fling it to another corner.
GitHub-style contribution heatmap that plays a self-running wave animation across the squares with no required interaction.
A 3D stacked card carousel driven by an invisible horizontal scroller; swipe left to advance cards through the organic scale/fade/rotate stack.
Airbnb-style profile card; tap the card to play the 3D rotateY flip revealing the back face, then capture the flipped state.
Full-screen liquid-glass blur overlay over a photo with a vertical drag/parallax; the glass surface renders its refraction effect without any required interaction.
Full-screen Skia blurred card fan; an absolute-fill PressableOpacity over the canvas toggles the cards between collapsed and the spring-fanned blurred layout on each tap.

Page-flip 'tear-off' calendar driven by a draggable slider (pan gesture); dragging the slider RIGHT flips through the days while the card animates each page. Note: there is NO tappable day grid — the only control is the slider, so a day-tap is impossible; we swipe the slider track instead.

Full-screen Skia fibonacci sphere of 2000 circles that auto-pulses; a tap on the RIGHT half re-randomizes the spiral multiplier and a pinch zooms. We swipe across the canvas (which the Pan/Tap detector resolves) to perturb it, then let the pulse animation settle.
Skia point-cloud 3D shape that morphs as you scroll a full-screen invisible horizontal pager; swiping the pager LEFT advances to the next shape, RIGHT goes back.

3D torus of avatar sprites that morphs into a scannable QR code; the bottom floating toggle button (scan/qr icon) springs between the torus and QR modes. No TextInput exists — content is hardcoded — so we drive the toggle button.
WebGPU GitHub-contributions terrain; tapping the full-screen canvas toggles between flat and raised 3D terrain, and a bottom-right Switch toggles real vs demo data.
WebGPU cherry-blossom tree whose canopy encodes a QR code; a TextInput (auto-focused) drives the QR content live. We type a URL into the input, then tap the canvas to toggle the flat/3D view.

WebGPU photo-mosaic gallery (10,000 photos) with double-tap-to-zoom into a cell, pinch and pan. Marked passive: a prior run rendered BLANK (WebGPU did not paint) on this build, so input cannot be reliably validated — we only assert the gallery canvas mounts.

react-native-chessboard that auto-replays a full game to a 'Game Review' end screen regardless of input; the New Game button and move history are hidden (SHOW_CHROME=false), so there is no clean tappable control and the auto-replay overrides any manual move. Marked passive — validate the board renders.
